content:
# Acidization Curve

**Summary**: A plot of acid injection rate versus the Pore Volumes of acid injected to achieve Breakthrough (PVBT).

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-mahrous|Mahrous, 2017]] analyed the acidization curve to identify the optimum injection rate.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-mahrous|Mahrous, 2017]] Used to determine the most economical and efficient acidizing strategy.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-mahrous|Mahrous, 2017]] Derived from 2D simulation results across varying injection rates.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The curve exhibits a concave upward shape, where the minimum point corresponds to the dominant wormhole dissolution pattern. ([[2017-mahrous|Mahrous, 2017, p. 95]])
